title: Plushies by PogUTatar
description: A small texture pack that adds plush versions of players as a totem of undying and carved pumpkin.
body:
# **Plush totems. Eng**
This resourcepack adds totems and carved pumpkins in the form of plush toys.

For 1.20-1.21.1:
- The [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) mod is required to work.
- For the convenience of [RP Renames](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames) mod.
  
For 1.21.5 and above:
- Just download.

# **Плюшевые тотемы. Ru**
Данный ресурспак добавляет тотемы и вырезанные тыквы в виде плюшевых игрушек.

Для 1.20-1.21.1:
- Для работы необходим мод [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn).
- Для удобства работы мод [RP Renames](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames).
  
Для 1.21.5 и выше:
- Просто скачайте.

![Plushies on the hat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/892f8bc6621de13e7f5f85103f265556269afe73.png)
